section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is doing treadmill exercise several times a week.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Exercise frequency is a patient-reported behavior/lifestyle history item rather than an observed exam or test result.

section_miscategorizations.text: The physician will consider renal denervation and spironolactone.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The phrase 'consider ... spironolactone' is ambiguous because the patient is already taking spironolactone per S; this is more a documentation consistency issue than a section misplacement, but could confuse whether this is a new plan vs. existing therapy.
